intents.name: Website Project Inquiry

slotPrompts.project_type: Kis type ki website chahiye? Landing page, business site, ya web app?
slotPrompts.features: Kya features chahiye? Jaise login, payment, dashboard?

intents.response: Sure! What kind of website are you looking for? Landing page, business site, or a full web app?

intents.name: Mobile App Project Inquiry

slotPrompts.platform: Android, iOS, ya dono platforms pe chahiye?

intents.response: Great! Are you looking for an Android app, iOS app, or both?

intents.name: AI Solution Inquiry

slotPrompts.use_case: AI ka use case kya hai? Customer support, sales, ya kuch aur?

intents.response: Interesting! What kind of AI solution are you thinking about? Chatbot, voice agent, or automation?

intents.name: Pricing Inquiry
intents.response: It depends on the project. A simple website starts around ₹25K, and apps from ₹1L. Want to share more details so I can give a better estimate?

intents.name: Timeline Inquiry
intents.response: Depends on complexity. A landing page takes 1-2 weeks, while a full app can take 6-12 weeks. What are you building?

intents.name: Tech Stack Inquiry
intents.response: We use React, Next.js, React Native, Supabase, and AI tools like GPT-4. What tech are you comfortable with?

intents.name: Collect Contact Info
intents.response: Sure! Let me get your phone number so I can send the details.

intents.name: Schedule Meeting

slotPrompts.preferred_time: What day and time works for you?

intents.response: I'd love to discuss your project! What day and time works best?

intents.name: Portfolio / Past Work Inquiry
intents.response: We've built websites, apps, and AI solutions for various clients. Want me to share some examples over WhatsApp or email?

intents.name: Maintenance & Support Inquiry
intents.response: We offer monthly maintenance plans starting at ₹10K/month. Includes bug fixes, updates, and monitoring.
